privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring Nginx in a Docker container at /home/ga/ssl-task to serve HTTPS on port 443. The expected certificate directory is /home/ga/ssl-task/certs, which contains self-signed certificates generated during setup. The expected text served on the webpage is 'Welcome to the Secure Local Site'.
